# CWE-344 safe: Use of Invariant Value in Dynamically Changing Context (mitigated, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-344-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/hmac"
	"crypto/sha256"
	"net/http"
	"os"
)

func SignShipmentManifest(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) error {
	secret := os.Getenv("SHIPMENT_HMAC_SECRET")
	if secret == "" {
		http.Error(w, "missing secret", http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return os.ErrInvalid
	}
	payload := []byte(r.FormValue("manifest"))
	mac := hmac.New(sha256.New, []byte(secret))
	mac.Write(payload)
	w.Write(mac.Sum(nil))
	return nil
}
